_curation_status: CURATED — 30 cases, 8-10 candidates each, 1-3 expected hits per case. First 6 cases are hand-curated by engineering covering core scenarios (telehealth, child/adolescent, license knockout, addiction, geriatric, veteran). Cases 7-30 are SYNTHETIC_NEEDS_REVIEW — generated via Claude research to expand coverage of forensic, perinatal, bilingual, eating disorders, crisis, concierge, locums, and collaborative-care scenarios. Discriminators concentrated on state-licensure knockouts (~75% of cases since APRN Compact is not yet operational in 2026), wrong-discipline distractors (FNP-BC / WHNP-BC / ambiguous Psychiatric APRN — ~30% of cases, concentrated in generalist settings), and age-group/setting/credential mismatches. Each case is hand-tuned so the LLM rerank can plausibly outperform pure cosine similarity. Production target per docs/ai-implementation-plan.md ticket 1.3.4 met (30 hand-rated tuples); next step is PMHNP-recruiter validation pass on cases 7-30 to confirm or adjust expected top-K rankings.
description: Talent-search rerank golden cases. Each case = (job summary, candidate list with ≥8 entries) → expected top-K candidate indices. Eval gate: mean(rerank precision@K) must be ≥ 1.20 × mean(vector precision@K) per architecture §1.3.4.
